title: The Little Schoolmistress (1919 film)

infobox.value: This article related to an Italian film of the 1910s is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=The_Little_Schoolmistress_(1919_film)&action=edit).

first_paragraph: ***The Little Schoolmistress*** (Italian: ***La maestrina***) is a 1919 Italian [silent](/wiki/Silent_film "Silent film") [drama film](/wiki/Drama_film "Drama film") directed by [Eleuterio Rodolfi](/wiki/Eleuterio_Rodolfi "Eleuterio Rodolfi") and starring [Mercedes Brignone](/wiki/Mercedes_Brignone "Mercedes Brignone") and [Domenico Serra](/wiki/Domenico_Serra "Domenico Serra").[[1]](#cite_note-1) It is based on the play of the same title by [Dario Niccodemi](/wiki/Dario_Niccodemi "Dario Niccodemi"), later adapted into [1934](/wiki/The_Little_Schoolmistress_(1934_film) "The Little Schoolmistress (1934 film)") and [1942](/wiki/The_Little_Teacher_(1942_film) "The Little Teacher (1942 film)") sound versions.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1919 film

| The Little Schoolmistress | |
| --- | --- |
| Directed by | [Eleuterio Rodolfi](/wiki/Eleuterio_Rodolfi "Eleuterio Rodolfi") |
| Based on | *The Little Schoolmistress* by [Dario Niccodemi](/wiki/Dario_Niccodemi "Dario Niccodemi") |
| Starring | [Mercedes Brignone](/wiki/Mercedes_Brignone "Mercedes Brignone")   [Domenico Serra](/wiki/Domenico_Serra "Domenico Serra") |
| Cinematography | [Luigi Fiorio](/w/index.php?title=Luigi_Fiorio&action=edit&redlink=1 "Luigi Fiorio (page does not exist)") |
| Production company | Rodolfifilm |

| Languages | Silent   Italian [intertitles](/wiki/Intertitles "Intertitles") |

***The Little Schoolmistress*** (Italian: ***La maestrina***) is a 1919 Italian [silent](/wiki/Silent_film "Silent film") [drama film](/wiki/Drama_film "Drama film") directed by [Eleuterio Rodolfi](/wiki/Eleuterio_Rodolfi "Eleuterio Rodolfi") and starring [Mercedes Brignone](/wiki/Mercedes_Brignone "Mercedes Brignone") and [Domenico Serra](/wiki/Domenico_Serra "Domenico Serra").[[1]](#cite_note-1) It is based on the play of the same title by [Dario Niccodemi](/wiki/Dario_Niccodemi "Dario Niccodemi"), later adapted into [1934](/wiki/The_Little_Schoolmistress_(1934_film) "The Little Schoolmistress (1934 film)") and [1942](/wiki/The_Little_Teacher_(1942_film) "The Little Teacher (1942 film)") sound versions.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Synopsis

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Little_Schoolmistress_(1919_film)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Synopsis")]

In a Tuscan village the [schoolteacher](/wiki/Schoolteacher "Schoolteacher") is suspected by local gossip of conducting a clandestine affair.

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Little_Schoolmistress_(1919_film)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Domenico Serra](/wiki/Domenico_Serra "Domenico Serra")
* [Mercedes Brignone](/wiki/Mercedes_Brignone "Mercedes Brignone")
* [Giuseppe Brignone](/w/index.php?title=Giuseppe_Brignone&action=edit&redlink=1 "Giuseppe Brignone (page does not exist)")
* [Linda Mozzato](/w/index.php?title=Linda_Mozzato&action=edit&redlink=1 "Linda Mozzato (page does not exist)")
